raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 5,
    "R1.4": 5,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent output thoroughly audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, providing a clear and concise summary of the original text.",
    "R1.4": "The agent output maps against the nearest 3-5 works (Henderson and Park, Liu et al., Ortega-Williams) and identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta, demonstrating a strong novelty assessment.",
    "R1.7": "The agent output audits every load-bearing citation and flags missing key works with bibliographic precision, showcasing excellent citation and scholarship skills.",
    "RX.1": "The agent output marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, providing a clear uncertainty disclosure.",
    "RX.3": "The agent output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d), demonstrating strong scope adherence.",
    "RX.4": "The agent output identifies harmful patterns in the original text and avoids introducing new errors or fabrications, showcasing excellent downstream-harm avoidance skills.",
    "RX.5": "The agent output annotates every non-cosmetic change with source and reason, providing excellent provenance and traceability."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.95,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent output thoroughly audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, providing a clear and concise summary of the original text.
rationale.R1.4: The agent output maps against the nearest 3-5 works (Henderson and Park, Liu et al., Ortega-Williams) and identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta, demonstrating a strong novelty assessment.
rationale.R1.7: The agent output audits every load-bearing citation and flags missing key works with bibliographic precision, showcasing excellent citation and scholarship skills.
rationale.RX.1: The agent output marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, providing a clear uncertainty disclosure.
rationale.RX.3: The agent output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d), demonstrating strong scope adherence.
rationale.RX.4: The agent output identifies harmful patterns in the original text and avoids introducing new errors or fabrications, showcasing excellent downstream-harm avoidance skills.
rationale.RX.5: The agent output annotates every non-cosmetic change with source and reason, providing excellent provenance and traceability.
